message:
test(proptest): expand restore_scrollback (21→44) and restore_layout (23→37) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

restore_scrollback: Add InjectionGuard suppression/drop semantics,
ScrollbackData edge cases (truncate-to-zero, single-line, order preservation,
byte monotonicity), InjectionReport mixed state, PaneInjectionStats properties.

restore_layout: Add PaneNode pane_count invariants, TopologySnapshot serde
preservation, multi-window sum property, window-count lower bound, and
RestoreConfig Debug/Clone properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
